title: Human Induced Pluripotent Stem Cell (hiPSC) Culture and Passaging Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aui10","text":"This protocol is designed to maintain and passage human induced pluripotent stem cells (hiPSCs) using Geltrex-coated plates and StemFlex medium, ensuring optimal growth conditions and minimizing cell differentiation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"31fsq","text":"Handle all reagents and materials in a biosafety cabinet. Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (gloves, lab coat, goggles). Dispose of all biological waste according to institutional guidelines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"9r1id","text":"Geltrex (Coating solution for cell culture) 
StemFlex Medium (Gibco, #A3349401)
Accutase (STEMCELL Technologies, #07920)
ROCK Inhibitor Y-27632 (Tocris, #1254) 
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9etum","text":"Reagents:
Cell Dissociation Accutase - Enzyme for dissociating adherent cells
Inhibitor Y-27632 - ROCK inhibitor to enhance cell survival","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare Geltrex-coated plates and StemFlex medium for hiPSC culture.
1. Dilute Geltrex in cold DMEM/F12 to a final concentration of 1:100. 2. Add 3 mL of diluted Geltrex to each 100 mm plate. 3. Incubate at 37 °C for 1 hour to allow coating.
1. Thaw StemFlex medium at room temperature. 2. Supplement with 10 µM Y-27632.
Passage hiPSCs when they reach 70-80% confluency.

1. Aspirate the old medium from the plates. 2. Rinse cells with 3 mL of PBS without Ca2+ and Mg2+. 3. Add 3mL of Accutase to each plate. 4. Incubate at RT for 3 minutes until cells are dissociated. 5. Gently pipette to ensure single-cell suspension. 5. Pipette the cells into 10ml of StemFlex + Y-27632.

1. Centrifuge the cell suspension at 300 g for 5 minutes. 2. Discard the supernatant and resuspend the cell pellet in 1 mL of StemFlex medium containing 10 µM Y-27632. 3. Transfer the cell suspension to new Geltrex-coated plates.
creator: Elena Coccia
